## Safety Boundary Impact

Confirm the proposal does not bypass:

- [ ] Human approval before final ATS action.
- [ ] No final ATS submission automation.
- [ ] Provider boundaries.
- [ ] Repository boundaries.
- [ ] Secret handling rules.
- [ ] Analytics read-only behavior.
